title: Sanji and Zoro Reach Their Limits
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Marco, Unknown person #8 as The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.
scene: The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Welcome aboard our ship. The Moby Dick!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh right, I should probably tell you what happened after you passed out.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Your crew came to take you back...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: They're all on board this ship.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: They're less injured than you are, actually.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, since they're not exactly guests, we've put them to work doing what- ever they're good at.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm in charge of your custody, after all.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...It's not like I can face them after what happened.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They've got a real handful of a captain!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: When exactly will you be able to face them again?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is it really alright to keep me on this ship...

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 25 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
